query: The Other Side ghost hunting game

items.title: All Anomalies in Animal Hospital
items.summary: This guide lists all of the Anomalies in Roblox's Animal Hospital, telling you the signs to watch out for and how to thwart every threat.
items.content:
How to thwart every single Anomaly you'll encounter in Animal Hospital.

Image credit: Eurogamer / Animal Anomaly Guide by Callum Williams Contributor Updated on July 13, 2026 Follow Roblox Last updated: July 13th, 2026 - Added new Anomalies from the recent Animal Hospital update.

The latest horror game to take Roblox by storm, Animal Hospital is another one of those pesky Anomaly-hunting games, where you need to greet customers, give them what they need, and, of course, make sure they aren't secretly a gremlin with spaghetti hands wearing something else's skin. Just an average customer service role, really, but those spaghetti-handed goblins can be mighty elusive, and we're here to help.

On this page, we've listed every Anomaly in Animal Hospital so you can survive the night, as well as providing key intel on how to spot the signs of each Anomaly and the method to combat them .

Wondering what Anomalies and spooky ghouls were added in the latest Animal Hospital update? Here are the latest additions to the Roblox horror game's Anomaly list. Click on each addition to skip down to our Anomaly entry:

items.title: What's coming next?
items.summary: What's Next? The Custom Difficulty Update launched just over a week ago, but we're already hard at work on what's coming next. New Ghosts Our next major update introduces 7 brand-new ghost types for Identify , each inspired by real-world fo
items.content:
What's Next?

The Custom Difficulty Update launched just over a week ago, but we're already hard at work on what's coming next.

New Ghosts

Our next major update introduces 7 brand-new ghost types for Identify, each inspired by real-world folklore and designed with unique behaviors that will challenge even experienced investigators.

Nas Nas

Known for its relentless speed, the Nas Nas darts and lunges with unpredictable bursts of movement, losing distances in an instant, and turning any encounter into a race.

Ataphoi

A restless spirit from ancient Greek lore, believed to bring misfortune and sickness to the living. Investigators report rarely seeing the Ataphoi in full form.

Hupia

A spirit from Tino folklore, the Hupia is a nocturnal spirit, known to be incredibly active after-dark. Investigators report feeling ill-prepared for the aggression the Hupia shows.

Wiederganger

A spirit that returns to the living world with unfinished business, the Wiederganger is tied to vengeance, or unrest, bringing increased dread to those who seek it out.

Marid

A powerful spirit from Arabic folklore, the Marid is believed to wield great supernatural influence, bringing misfortune and twisting outcomes to those who encounter it.

The Sluagh

A host of restless spirits in Irish and Scottish folklore, said to travel together as a dark force.

The Púca

Known for its unpredictable and mischievous nature, often toying with the living for its own amusement.

Each ghost will have their own behaviors, unique to their real-life lore.

New Equipment & Evidence

Alongside these new ghosts comes one of our most requested additions.

Wireless Camcorder

The Wireless Camcorder will allow investigators to monitor locations remotely, working seamlessly with our surveillance systems to open up new investigative strategies.

Ghost Orbs

Ghost Orbs are joining the evidence roster, but not in the way you might expect. Rather than feeling like simple floating particles, we're designing them to behave naturally and feel genuinely unsettling when spotted.

Two New Locations

The McGavin House

Explore a beautifully preserved early 19th-century home where history and horror intertwine. Though officially remembered as the estate of an unsolved murder, those willing to dig a little deeper may discover that the truth has been waiting nearly two centuries to be uncovered.

Blackmeadow Farm

Nestled in the countryside, The Blackmeadow Farm has been home to the same family for generations. Recently however, unexplained disturbances have transformed daily life into a nightmare. Strange noises echo through the barn after dark, shadows moving through the halls, and the family insists they are no longer alone.

Why the Wait?

We know many of you are eager to jump into this update, and so are we... But these aren't features we want to rush.

Every ghost is being carefully designed to stay as faithful as possible to the folklore that inspired it. Ghost Orbs are receiving extra attention to ensure they feel believable rather than distracting, and the Wireless Camcorder is being built to integrate naturally into the investigation experience.

We'll announce a release date once we're confident the update is ready.

Trust us, this one will be worth the wait.

items.title: Version 0.9.8.0_b
items.summary: Version 0.9.8.0_b A small update focused on balancing, quality-of-life improvements, and bug fixes. Added Added Seasoned and Veteran difficulty presets (6 standard difficulty presets total) [/*] Added Hidden Presets that can be copied for C

Version 0.9.8.0_b

A small update focused on balancing, quality-of-life improvements, and bug fixes.

Added

  • Added Seasoned and Veteran difficulty presets (6 standard difficulty presets total)

    [/*]

  • Added Hidden Presets that can be copied for Custom Difficulties but do not appear in the main difficulty selection menu

    [/*]

  • Added XP multipliers to sessions in the Session Browser

    [/*]

  • Added 7 new Official Content Creator Cosmetic Packages

    [/*]

Balance & Quality of Life

  • Balanced all standard difficulty presets

    [/*]

  • Increased the rate at which temperatures rise in non-favorite rooms after the ghost changes favorite rooms

    [/*]

  • Increased evidence drop chance (33% → 50%)

    [/*]

  • Reduced Loaner Box fee (33% → 12%)

    [/*]

  • Removed idle breathing animation when Headbob Reduction is enabled

    [/*]

Hidden Presets

The following presets have been moved to Hidden Presets:

  • Masochist

    [/*]

  • Streamer Bait

    [/*]

  • Forensic Lockdown

    [/*]

These presets can still be copied and used as a starting point for Custom Difficulties.

Fixes

  • Fixed a Wraith issue that could cause it to incorrectly show feet after extending a hunt

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where some players could incorrectly receive a 1.0x reward multiplier at the post-contract payout screen despite primary tasks being completed successfully

    [/*]

Known Issues:

  • Post contract summary stat "Time in Favorite Location" shows only the time the ghost spent in the last favorite location

    [/*]

items.title: 10 Games to Play if You Love MECCHA CHAMELEON
items.summary: MECCHA CHAMELEON is a fantastic hide-and-seek game, but there are plenty of other titles for you to check out.
items.content:
By Aden Carter Published Jun 17, 2026, 8:30 AM EDT Aden Carter is a Contributor at DualShockers who has been covering games professionally since 2020. He specializes in lists and guides, with a focus on RPGs, horror games, survival horror, Soulslikes, cozy/sim games, and action-adventure titles.

Before joining DualShockers, Aden contributed to GameRant , XDA , Gamepur , Impulse Gamer , and WePC . He currently also works with GameSandwich and VideoGamer , where he handles guide content, news, and reviews for the latest games. Across his games writing career, he has worked as a freelance writer and editor, with experience reviewing around 40 games and interviewing multiple indie developers. Aden holds a B.A. in Creative Writing for Entertainment .

MECCHA CHAMELEON is not the first hide-and-seek game on the market, but it has managed to catch the attention of thousands, as its unique painting mechanic stands out.

Instead of hiding normally, you get to paint yourself into your environment, making things a bit more difficult. It is a unique take on a classic game genre, and it makes it that much more fun to play.

Forget blockbuster AAA games! We want some plucky little indies!

If you have found yourself going back to MECCHA CHAMELEON over and over again, you might want to check out some of these other titles that offer the same type of hide-and-seek action, but in a different way.

Expand Collapse Midnight Murder Club is a very fun title created by Velan Studios, and it is designed to give you a crazy shooter experience inside a massive mansion. You and your friends enter a mansion, each armed with a pistol. The catch is that everything is pitch black, making it a large game of hide-and-seek where the objective is to find and kill each other.

You have a flashlight that you can use to find your way, and you will need it, as it is impossible to see without it. Of course, using this flashlight will help others see you as well.

To add to the chaos, there are various game mode modifiers that allow you to change how the game is played. Some cards add the ability to shoot through walls, and others allow you to shrink. Some even cause loud jazz music to play when you shoot your pistol.

Expand Collapse Have you ever been in a fight with a friend or sibling while playing a local PvP game and been accused of screencheating or screenpeaking? Well, the game Screencheat requires you to do this.

Screencheat is like a big game of hide-and-seek, but the catch is that you are all shooters who are invisible. Just looking at your screen will not help you find anyone. That is why everyone else's screens appear as well.

You are meant to look at the other screens that appear as split-screen style on your own to determine where each player is and take them out. It definitely puts a new spin on the shooter genre and gives it that hide-and-seek feeling.

Expand Collapse Among Us became a massive hit a few years back, and there are plenty of people who still play it to this day, and for good reason. It is a social deduction game where the killer needs to blend in, take out their crewmates, and then make everyone believe it was someone else.

While it is not necessarily a hide-and-seek title, the game shares some similarities with the genre, where the killer needs to remain hidden and not be sussed out by the other crewmates.

items.title: Custom Difficulty | Version 0.9.8.0
items.summary: Version 0.9.8.0 - Custom Difficulty Update Hello Investigators, Version 0.9.8.0 introduces one of the largest gameplay customization updates we've released so far. With the new Custom Difficulty System , you'll be able to tailor investigati
items.content:
Version 0.9.8.0 - Custom Difficulty Update

Hello Investigators,

Version 0.9.8.0 introduces one of the largest gameplay customization updates we've released so far. With the new Custom Difficulty System, you'll be able to tailor investigations to match your preferred playstyle, whether you're looking for a casual ghost hunt or a brutal challenge that pushes your team to its limits.

This update also includes a highly requested Headbob Reduction option, inventory improvements, contract selection enhancements, gameplay adjustments, and a variety of fixes.

Custom Difficulty System

The new Custom Difficulty System allows you to customize nearly every aspect of an investigation.

Adjust ghost behavior, hunt settings, evidence availability, player limitations, rewards, and much more. Reward multipliers will scale based on your selected settings, allowing you to create your own unique challenge.

False Evidence (Identify)

On higher difficulties, ghosts can now leave behind False Evidence.

False evidence initially appears as the strongest form of evidence before gradually degrading over time.

Examples:

  • Audio 3 → Audio 2 → Audio 1

    [/*]

  • UV 3 → UV 2 → UV 1

    [/*]

  • Writing 3 → Writing 2 → Writing 1

    [/*]

When investigating, you'll need to decide whether to:

  • Rule out the ghost using its behaviors

    [/*]

  • Wait for suspicious evidence to degrade before making a final decision

    [/*]

Evidence Breakdown

Novice

  • 3 Real Evidence

    [/*]

  • No False Evidence

    [/*]

Intermediate

  • 3 Real Evidence

    [/*]

  • No False Evidence

    [/*]

Expert

  • 2 Real Evidence

    [/*]

  • 1 False Evidence

    [/*]

Master

  • 1 Real Evidence

    [/*]

  • 2 False Evidence

    [/*]

Favorite Room Changes

Ghosts can now change their favorite room during an investigation.

Frequency varies by difficulty:

  • Intermediate: Low Chance

    [/*]

  • Expert: Medium Chance

    [/*]

  • Master: High Chance

    [/*]

When this occurs, the previous favorite room will not immediately return to normal temperatures. Instead, it will slowly warm back up over several minutes.

Keep monitoring the location carefully. The room you started in may not be the room you finish in.

Continuous Hunts After Death

With this modifier enabled, successfully killing a player will immediately restart the hunt timer.

The hunt doesn't end simply because someone died.

Shared Consequences

With this modifier enabled, if one investigator dies, the entire team dies.

This includes teammates who are outside of the huntable location.

Random Door Lockdowns

On higher difficulties, ghosts may occasionally lock nearby doors.

  • Up to 2 doors can be locked at once

    [/*]

  • Eligible doors are selected near the ghost's favorite room

    [/*]

  • Doors remain locked for 30–45 seconds

    [/*]

  • The ghost can still initiate hunts while doors are locked

    [/*]

Don't get trapped.

Random Tarot Card Effects

When enabled, each player begins the contract with a random tarot card effect.

Possible effects include:

  • Sleepy

    [/*]

  • Squeaky Feet

    [/*]

  • Blurry Vision

    [/*]

  • Random Screams

    [/*]

  • Butter Fingers

    [/*]

Each player receives their own effect, meaning teammates may begin the contract with entirely different conditions.

Adjustable Inventory Capacity

Customize how many items players can carry at once.

Available options:

  • 1 Item

    [/*]

  • 2 Items

    [/*]

  • 3 Items

    [/*]

  • 4 Items

    [/*]

Headgear is not affected by this setting.

Forced Evidence

Certain ghosts now have evidence types that will always appear when evidence is limited.

This does not apply to Zero Evidence configurations.

Create Your Own Challenges

Custom Difficulty isn't limited to the built-in presets. You can create and save up to 13 custom difficulty configurations, each with their own unique rules, restrictions, and reward multipliers.

Build your own challenge modes, experiment with unusual settings, or create custom presets tailored for different groups of friends. Once saved, your presets can be selected at any time from the difficulty menu.

From casual investigations to nightmare fuel, the choice is yours.

Heart Rate System Adjustments

You'll notice that the Starting Heart Rate modifier includes values that differ from the previous versions. This is because the entire heart rate system has been rebalanced.

New Heart Rate Range

Previous:

  • 80 BPM → 140 BPM

    [/*]

New:

  • 60 BPM → 160 BPM

    [/*]

New Heart Rate Status Tiers

  • Normal

    [/*]

  • Anxious

    [/*]

  • Panicked

    [/*]

  • Distressed

    [/*]

Hunt Changes

  • Demons can now hunt when players are Anxious

    [/*]

  • All ghosts can hunt when players are Panicked or Distressed

    [/*]

Additionally, hunt chances are no longer fixed once a threshold is reached. The higher your heart rate rises, the greater the chance of a hunt occurring, creating a more dynamic escalation of danger throughout the investigation.

Dedicated Headgear Slot

Headgear no longer occupies one of your inventory slots.

A new dedicated equipment slot has been added specifically for head-mounted gear, ensuring that inventory capacity modifiers won't remove your ability to use a headlamp.

Additional notes:

  • Holding the drop key will drop your headgear

    [/*]

  • Headgear functionality remains on its own keybind

    [/*]

  • Inventory capacity settings do not affect headgear

    [/*]

Laptop Overhaul

The contract laptop has received a significant usability update.

You can now:

  • Purchase equipment

    [/*]

  • Organize your loadout

    [/*]

  • Select equipment to bring into a contract

    [/*]

All from a single interface without needing to run and back and forth between the crate and your laptop!

Headbob Reduction Setting

One of the most requested accessibility features is finally here.

A new Headbob Reduction setting has been added, significantly reducing camera movement while preserving multiplayer animation synchronization.

This feature is currently considered experimental and may continue to improve in future updates.

Spectral Affixer Changes (Cleanse)

The Spectral Affixer has been adjusted to reduce unnecessary punishment on higher difficulties.

You can now only enter the exact number of characteristics required for a scan.

Examples:

  • If a scan requires 2 characteristics, you may only enter 2 total

    [/*]

  • If a scan requires 3 characteristics, you may only enter 3 total

    [/*]

This change applies regardless of difficulty settings and removes situations where higher difficulties could unintentionally punish players simply for entering additional information.

Additional Changes

Contract Guide

  • The contract guide on your cellphone now displays active difficulty modifiers

    [/*]

Grace Period

  • Added a 5-second grace period when returning from the Death Room

    [/*]

Session Codes

  • Removed ambiguous characters from invite codes

    [/*]

Hiding Spots

  • Adjusted various hiding spots throughout multiple locations

    [/*]

Identify Mode

  • Various gameplay improvements and balancing adjustments

    [/*]

EMF

  • Low-grade EMF can now occasionally remain after ghost events

    [/*]

Remote Temperature Sensor

  • Cost reduced from $150 to $90

    [/*]

  • Temperature updates now occur faster

    [/*]

Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where the Doppelganger could occasionally hunt from outside its favorite room under rare circumstances

    [/*]

  • Fixed the Pickup Truck clipping into a fence on Abaddon Hallows East

    [/*]

  • Various stability fixes

    [/*]

Thank you for all of the feedback and suggestions that helped shape this update!

We're excited to see the custom challenges, chaotic investigations, and creative difficulty presets the community comes up with.

See you on the other side.

-The Other Side Development Team

items.title: Phasmophobia Alan Wake Event Explained: What You Need to Know

Version 0.9.7.5_h

Thank you to the entire community for helping spot many of these issues and suggesting several of these quality-of-life additions during our last stage meeting in the Discord. Your feedback genuinely helps shape The Other Side and we appreciate everyone who took the time to participate!

    [/*]

    [/*]

    [/*]

  • Players you encounter in-game are now automatically added to Steam's Recent Players list

    [/*]

    [/*]

Changes:

    [/*]

    [/*]

  • Players can no longer join sessions that are already at capacity

    [/*]

  • Reduced radio voice chat volume

    [/*]

  • Improved Spectral Affixer lighting quality

    [/*]

  • Reduced the long black screen delay after the drive-up intro finishes

    [/*]

Fixes:

  • Fixed an issue where rapidly clicking could cause Holy Water to spray multiple times at once, instantly consuming all charges

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where the mouse cursor would snap back to the center of the screen after returning to the main menu

    [/*]

  • Removed the Easter Event tab from the HQ laptop browser's homepage

    [/*]

  • Fixed an issue where disconnecting from the session while interacting with the Spectral Affixer would leave it unusable

    [/*]

  • Fixed glitch spots in Abaddon Hallows East

    [/*]

  • Fixed glitch spots in Summerhill Psychiatric Institution

    [/*]

  • Corrected Shura and Skia ghost speed discrepancies from previous patch notes

    [/*]

  • Fixed an event in Summerhill Psychiatric Institution causing the door to remain locked for several minutes

    [/*]

  • Fixed the tricycle causing players to glitch through the floor in St. Joseph's Orphanage

    [/*]

  • Fixed the Doppelganger being able to hunt from outside of its favorite room

    [/*]

items.title: Version 0.9.7.5_g - Adopt Your Bunny!
items.summary: Version 0.9.7.5_g - Adopt Your Bunny! We’ve seen a massive wave of new investigators joining The Other Side recently, and a lot of you just missed out on the Easter Event’s exclusive Pet Bunny, our very first Headquarters pet. So, we’re doi
items.content:
Version 0.9.7.5_g - Adopt Your Bunny!

We’ve seen a massive wave of new investigators joining The Other Side recently, and a lot of you just missed out on the Easter Event’s exclusive Pet Bunny, our very first Headquarters pet.

So, we’re doing something special.

Content Creators will soon receive an exclusive HQ furniture item: a Bunny Kennel. Players who visit a participating creator’s Headquarters will be able to interact with the kennel to unlock their own Pet Bunny to keep in their HQs permanently.

Thank you all for the incredible support lately we have a ton of new stuff coming real soon!

Fixes:

  • Improved network stability for connections with changing NATs

    [/*]

  • Fixed shadows on some furniture

    [/*]

  • Fixed a spot in Abaddon East where ghosts could become stuck

    [/*]

  • Performance optimizations in Abaddon East/West

    [/*]

  • Tricycle in St. Joseph's Orphanage could cause players to get pushed below the floor

    [/*]

  • Various other minor performance/stability fixes

    [/*]

Changes:

  • Windowed Mode now has a border to allow resizing and dragging

    [/*]

  • Adjusted the radio volume to better match proximity voice chat

    [/*]

  • Adjusted Leaderboard TV furniture UI to support numbers above 999

    [/*]

Additions:

  • Content Creators now have a Bunny Kennel furniture that visiting players to their HQ can interact with to obtain their own pet bunny!*

    [/*]

*Starting at 4PM BST / 11AM EST - Visit a content creator lobby (labeled CONTENT CREATOR in the session finder) and interact with the kennel to claim your bunny. There are 5 different fur variations and is unchangeable. One bunny per person. No returns.

items.title: New Investigators Welcome
items.summary: New Investigators Welcome! We've seen a huge new wave of players discovering The Other Side lately - so we're kicking off a 7-day sale to celebrate. Whether this is your first time stepping into the paranormal genre, or you're bringing your
items.content:
New Investigators Welcome!

We've seen a huge new wave of players discovering The Other Side lately - so we're kicking off a 7-day sale to celebrate.

Whether this is your first time stepping into the paranormal genre, or you're bringing your full 6-player team back for another night of ghost hunting, there's never been a better time to jump in.

Thank you for all the support lately. More is coming.

The Other Side is now on sale for a limited time!

items.title: Everything Revealed During The Galaxies Spring Showcase 2026
items.summary: We have the full rundown of every video game featured in the Galaxies Spring Showcase 2026 that took place this week
items.content:
Posted in: Games , Indie Games , Video Games | Tagged: Galaxies Spring Showcase

We have the full rundown of every video game featured in the Galaxies Spring Showcase 2026 that took place this week

The Galaxies Spring Showcase 2026 livestream took place this week, with organizers highlighting dozens of video games, from AAA titles to indie darlings. This was a 90 minute block of features and trailers, giving updates and premieres for 50 different video games across several genres. The off part about the stream is that it's tied to no event; it's just one of the most random commercial-fest showcases you'll see every calendar year that seems like it has little reason to exist, other than to promote games in a month with no major IRL events. You can watch it above as we have the full rundown of every game on the show below.

33 Immortals is a co-op action-roguelike for 33 players. Play a damned soul, and rebel against God's final judgment. Pick-up and raid, cooperate to survive hordes of monsters, defeat massive bosses, and face the wrath of God in the ultimate fight for your eternal life.

'83 is a 40v40 squad based, objective focused online tactical first person shooter set in a Cold-War-Gone-Hot scenario. It's designed with 'accessible realism' for the most enjoyable, but still hardcore experience that gets you to the action fast, without losing the lethality of war.

Play as Kenneth, a private detective, and Blue, a runaway searching for answers. Explore the megacity of Republica in a semi-open world, solve criminal cases, make decisive moral choices, and uncover the truth behind Blue's past.

Akatori is an epic metroidvania where you wield your staff to fight, jump, and explore diverse realms across different eras. Explore worlds spanning different eras, battle formidable enemies, and help Mako stop the Amber Storms that poison all living things.

Welcome to a utopian world of wonders and perfection, in which humans live in harmony with their loyal and fervent robots. The unstoppable course of technology along with secret experiments have brought rise to mutant creatures, terrifying machines and superpowered robots—all suddenly rebelling against their creators. Only you can stop them and find out what lies behind the idealized world.

Step into the driver's seat in Bus Bound, the latest title from the creators of Bus Simulator 21. Explore a vibrant city in officially licensed buses, and help transform it into a pedestrian-friendly paradise—one stop at a time.

Causal Loop is a narrative puzzler that blends mind-bending mechanics with a rich sci-fi story about time, consequence, and survival. Solve intricate puzzles by using the signature "echo" mechanic to record, replay, and interact with up to three versions of your past self. Can you break the loop?

Construction Simulator: Evolution is going to offer the most immersive construction worker experience so far. Simulation fans can look forward to Volvo Construction Equipment and other new license partners. Next to this, the game will offer access to challenging manual labor and impressive demolition works, as well as numerous other brand-new and unprecedented features!

Dawn of Defense is an RTS–Tower Defense Roguelite where you raise your defenses, command troops in real time, and build your war economy. Defend against relentless hordes while leading counterattacks to secure resources and expand your territory. Adapt each run with powerful upgrades as you reclaim your homeland from the baneful Empire.

High-speed Acelike Roguelike with SSSTYLE. Cut across cel-shaded, action-packed, arcade-paced dogfights as you fly, fight, and upgrade your roster of kickass planes. Every battle is massive, every location is procedural, and every fight is a spectacle- whether it's aircraft, blimps, dragons, or mechs

From the creators of Until Dawn and The Quarry, an all-new sci-fi survival horror adventure. Hunted by an alien organism capable of mimicking its prey, the crew of the Cassiopeia must outwit their pursuers to make it home alive. To help them survive, the choices you make are more important than ever! Evade real-time threats where any step could be your last. Decide who to trust in a world where anyone could be a deadly extraterrestrial impostor.

items.title: The Other Side's 2026 Easter Event Is Here!
items.summary: The Haunted Hunt has begun. Easter eggs have begun appearing across contracts… but these aren’t your typical holiday treats. Search each location to uncover hidden eggs scattered throughout the map. Smaller maps contain 24 eggs, while large
items.content:
The Haunted Hunt has begun.

Easter eggs have begun appearing across contracts… but these aren’t your typical holiday treats. Search each location to uncover hidden eggs scattered throughout the map. Smaller maps contain 24 eggs, while larger locations hold up to 36. With hundreds of possible spawn points per map, no two hunts will ever feel the same.

But be careful. Not every egg is safe.

Some eggs carry negative effects that can increase ghost aggression, boost its speed, and reduce hunt cooldowns. The more you collect, the more dangerous the contract may become.

Outside of contracts, the hunt continues.

All players receive eggs to place in their Headquarters. Visiting other players’ HQs and interacting with their eggs rewards both players with event currency, encouraging exploration and “headquarter hopping.”

Additional eggs can be earned by:

  • Achieving perfect games

    [/*]

  • Finding bonus eggs

    [/*]

  • Completing optional objectives

    [/*]

  • Hosting and visiting HQs

    [/*]

You’ll have limited time to gather as many eggs as possible:

  • 4 minutes on smaller maps

    [/*]

  • 5 minutes on larger maps

    [/*]

Maps rotate daily, with all maps available on the final day. Rotation occurs at 5PM EST.

Earn currency, take risks, and unlock exclusive rewards during this limited-time event.

Happy Hunting and Good Luck!

items.title: Critical Issue Fixes
items.summary: Version 0.9.7.4-8 This patch finally fixes a couple critical issues such as players sometimes getting disconnected back to the main menu upon loading into a contract along with the Open Mic voice chat crash. Fixes: Using open mic voice chat
items.content:
Version 0.9.7.4-8

This patch finally fixes a couple critical issues such as players sometimes getting disconnected back to the main menu upon loading into a contract along with the Open Mic voice chat crash.

Fixes:

  • Using open mic voice chat would often cause a crash for players when transitioning from HQ -> Contract or Contract -> HQ.

    [/*]

  • Players would sometimes lose connection to the host when transitioning from HQ -> Contract or Contract -> HQ.

    [/*]

items.title: Version 0.9.7.4_6 - Stability Patch
items.summary: Version 0.9.7.4_6 - Stability Patch This update is to address a bunch of stability issues that are affecting a wide range of players. Notably the voice chat issue that would cause players to crash when using open-mic should be resolved. We
items.content:
Version 0.9.7.4_6 - Stability Patch

This update is to address a bunch of stability issues that are affecting a wide range of players. Notably the voice chat issue that would cause players to crash when using open-mic should be resolved. We are going to keep an eye on the bug-reports, so please make sure to submit those if your game crashes as it helps us out tremendously.

Fixes:

  • Increased stability when transition between maps

    [/*]

  • Voice chat causing a crash with open mic when transitioning between maps

    [/*]

  • Closing the game while in a session would often cause a "steam64" crash

    [/*]

  • Affixer would cause players to get stuck in it when interacted with by another player as they were exiting the interface

    [/*]

  • Increased brightness would cause odd fading in/out after respawning

    [/*]

  • Incorrect active audio input device would be displayed in the audio settings

    [/*]

  • Performance optimizations in Ravenwood, Cedar, and Stone Manor

    [/*]

Changes:

  • Cellphone no longer flashes to complete darkness when near a hunting ghost, instead dims to half brightness

    [/*]

  • Initial setup durations have been adjusted per difficulty

    • Novice = 3 minutes

      [/*]

    • Intermediate = 2 minutes

      [/*]

    • Expert = 1 minute

      [/*]

    • Master = No setup time

      [/*]
    [/*]

  • Increased the Fast LOS speed slightly (Wewe Gombel and Wraith)

    [/*]

  • Loading screen visual refresh with new tooltips

    [/*]

Additions:

  • Toggle Voice Chat setting

    [/*]

  • Developer cash register furniture which grants visiting players that interact with it $2,000 and a 2XP ticket*

    [/*]

*Visit a developer lobby (labeled DEVELOPER in the session finder) and interact with the cash register to gain your reward. There is a 2-hour cooldown. When a developer lobby is open, there will be a global message in the text chat box. These lobbies will not be available too often, so get it while they're open!

items.title: The Final Hunt of the Onryo Walkthrough
items.summary: The Final Hunt of the Onryo is the final Revenge mission of both Chapter III and Ghost of Yotei. With the help of an unlikely source, Atsu travels to
items.content:
The Final Hunt of the Onryo is the final Revenge mission of both Chapter III and Ghost of Yotei . With the help of an unlikely source, Atsu travels to Saito's hidden fortress, where her allies are being held captive. It's a lengthy mission that tests you on everything you've learned while playing the game. This Ghost of Yotei walkthrough for The Final Hunt of the Onryo includes instructions on how to begin, complete the fortress stealth section, rescue your allies, and defeat Lord Saito.

This guide contains significant story spoilers. Read on with caution.

As per the events of Call of the Hunt, the Spider has agreed to take Atsu to Saito's fortress, where she should be able to find and rescue the captured Jubei and Oyuki. He asks her to meet him near the Central Ferry, located in the northern section of the Tokachi Range , just south of the Great Lake.

To set a marker for the location, open your map and look for the Golden Gingko Leaf icon in the narrow strip between the Tokachi Range and the Great Lake. Track the icon to travel there by horse, or use the fast travel option on the Central Ferry icon, since you've been there before .

Continue past the Central Ferry after arriving and look for the Spider waiting near a boat next to the Torii gate that leads to the Risen Fog Shrine .

Speaking with the Spider and agreeing to get taken to Saito's fortress locks you into the mission. If you have other tasks you want to complete before progressing, this is your last chance.

Before going past the point of no return, you should make sure you're completely prepared for the challenges to come. Lord Saito has a reputation for being a master of all weapons . Before facing him, it's wise to have all weapons with alignments unlocked:

You should also use the forge at Atsu's homestead and upgrade all weapons to their maximum level. There are incredibly useful techniques and skills you should have unlocked before continuing with the final mission. These abilities will greatly increase your chances of success:

If you need help tracking down Altars of Reflection, check out our guide .

Finally, be sure you're fully stocked on ammunition, Quickfire weapons, and sake . Purchase these items or camp and craft some.

Speak with the Spider when you're ready to begin the final mission. The game will warn you ahead of time that you're about to go past the point of no return. Choose YES to begin, or NOT YET if you have more tasks to complete first. If you pick YES, you're locked into the mission until it's finished.

After you begin the quest, Atsu and the Spider are riding north up through the Great Lake. The former bitter enemies have a quaint talk about the future. The Spider tells her he plans on heading back to the mainland to find himself, now that his father and brother no longer have a hold over him. This leads to two options for your reply:

As per the norm, neither option will change the outcome of the mission or story. Feel free to pick any one you'd like.

Their journey continues, and soon Atsu learns just where Saito's fortress has been hidden this whole time: High in the mountains, surrounded by steep cliffs and thick forest.

items.title: Ghost of Yotei: Twin Wolves, Twin Hearts Walkthrough
items.summary: Learn how to find Mad Goro for the mission Twin Wolves, Twin Hearts in Ghost of Yotei. Atsu and Jubei are now working as one to defeat the Oni
items.content:
Learn how to find Mad Goro for the mission Twin Wolves, Twin Hearts in Ghost of Yotei. Atsu and Jubei are now working as one to defeat the Oni. But in order to find a way in, they’ll need to find the madman that escaped the Oni’s castle.

After escaping the Oni Raider attack on the bridge , you’ll need to meet Jubei at the Northern Matsumae Camp in Ishikari Plane.

As you travel there, you’re going to run into the Masked Man’s Quarry. This quarry is inhabited by Oni Raiders and you’ll need to clear them out to liberate the quarry.

The raiders here are more elite soldiers and will be more difficult to take down. As you clear the camp, be sure to go inside their tents to loot any materials inside.

For your efforts, you’ll gain access to an Altar of Reflection and can safely meet up with Jubei. Don’t forget to loot the pile of materials and chests you also get as a reward.

After going inside the Matsumae camp, you’ll be able to find Jubei and Commander Wada in the large tend with the four banners in front of it.

Click or tap the image to zoom in After the cutscene, follow Jubei to the stables to begin the quest Twin Wolves, Twin Hearts. Word is going around that an eccentric priest is at the summit of a mountain-top shrine.

Follow Jubei on horseback until you reach the Azure Wind Shrine. Look for the alcove and help Jubei up so you two can start your climb to the shrine.

You’ll reach a camp full of bounty hunters. Defeat them, loot the chests in the area, then follow Jubei to the burned bridge.

To reach the other side, go to the left of the bridge and look for a tree branch you can grapple onto. Go across, grapple onto another branch ahead, then climb up to get to the other side of the bridge.

Grapple onto the loose part of the bridge and pull it off to clear the way for Jubei. Go into the cave ahead to start your way to the shrine.

As you go through the cave, you’ll fall down a bridge. Up ahead is a chest, keep this in mind for later.

Go outside and platform your way down the path until you see Jubei. To the left of him is the cave exit where you’ll find that chest you missed earlier. Grapple across and swing to the other cliff and climb up.

When you reach the other side, Jubei will go to the right. Go to the left and loot the chest inside the cave to get some Oni Raider masks. After that, follow Jubei and continue climbing up the mountain.
